description: Playable Locations API is a Google Maps Platform service for games that returns candidate real-world playable locations and accepts impression and player-report logging. It is exposed as a versioned HTTPS API under `playablelocations.googleapis.com`.
summary: One HTTP REST API surface is publicly documented for playablelocations.googleapis.com: the Playable Locations API v3 at `https://playablelocations.googleapis.com`, with an OpenAPI document mirrored by APIs.guru and auth via Google API key and/or Google OAuth 2.0 token query parameters.
